Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Stellar Spear]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Stellar Spear is a technique.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Stellar Spear madra is white as snow and sharp as an axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Stellar Spear is a path or discipline that includes the Star's Edge technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Path of the Stellar Spear is a Path that branches from the Path of the Broken Star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Stellar Spear lacks Ruler techniques suited for battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Stellar Spear is a madra technique used by Jai Daishou.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — The Path of the Stellar Spear contains no Ruler techniques.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Stellar Spear is a type of madra.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The Stellar Spear is an aura chamber.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Chen's Path includes Stellar Spear.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
